items.name_en: N00109 Pocket Wallet! This pocket wallet is rendered in Damoflage coated canvas with vibrant tones, featuring card slots, an interior pocket, and a rear external patch pocket. Its compact design makes it easy to slide into various pockets.
items.name_cn:
N00109 Pocket Wallet! This pocket wallet is rendered in Damoflage coated canvas with vibrant tones, featuring card slots, an interior pocket, and a rear external patch pocket. Its compact design makes it easy to slide into various pockets.
11.1 x 1 x 7.5 cm
(High x Width x Length)

items.name_en: Gold Clasp! M41939 Brown & Gold! Small yet extremely practical! This colorful envelope coin purse is the perfect companion for the modern woman in the city. Compact and easy to fit into a bag or even a pocket. Size: 11X8cm.

items.name_en: 💖 Full set of original counter packaging 💖 [New] The iconic GG Supreme canvas makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 Early Autumn collection, reinterpreting the new floral print with blue tones. This beige and dark brown full-zip wallet is embellished with a modern floral pattern and GG logo.
items.name_cn:
💖 Full set of original counter packaging 💖 [New] The iconic GG Supreme canvas makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 Early Autumn collection, reinterpreting the new floral print with blue tones. This beige and dark brown full-zip wallet is embellished with a modern floral pattern and GG logo.
Beige and dark brown GG Supreme canvas
All-over blue floral print
Cloud print fabric lining
Inside: 12 card slots, 3 bill compartments, and 1 zip coin pocket
Zip closure
Model: 841150
Size: 19cm (W) x 10.5cm (H) x 2.5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 230g
Color: Brown embossed / Original leather.
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】Inspired by the brand's heritage, the circular interlocking double-G motif adds a touch of elegance to accessories in matte blue calfskin. On this matte blue calfskin card holder, this 1970s-style motif radiates timeless charm. The interior is thoughtfully designed with multiple slots for versatile use.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】Inspired by the brand's heritage, the circular interlocking double-G motif adds a touch of elegance to accessories in matte blue calfskin. On this matte blue calfskin card holder, this 1970s-style motif radiates timeless charm. The interior is thoughtfully designed with multiple slots for versatile use.
Matte blue calfskin
Taffeta lining
Enamel circular interlocking details
Inside: Card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818795.
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Blue matte leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M13992 Black/Color】Takashi Murakami Collaboration Series. This Zippy coin wallet is made of Monogram canvas and is practical, featuring a spacious compartment, a zip coin pocket, and multiple credit card slots. Named for its secure wrap-around zip, it features a grained leather lining. Fully functional, it can also be used as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
